basic_details.job_title: Pauri Garhwal District Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Pauri Garhwal District has released the official Junior Engineer (Civil) Notification 2026 under Advertisement No. 74 / 02(1).2.1 / 2026-27. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the Pauri Garhwal District Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026. Candidates possessing a Diploma in Civil Engineering from a recognized institute are eligible to apply, while candidates with a B.E./B.Tech in Civil Engineering will be given preference. Applicants should also have a minimum of one year of experience in construction works and proficiency in CAD software such as AutoCAD or Civil 3D. Interested candida

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma in Civil Engineering from a recognized institute, Bachelor's degree in civil engineering (B.E./B.Tech.) preferred, Minimum 1 year work experience in construction works, Proficiency in CAD software (e.g., AutoCAD, Civil 3D)
qualification.details: Diploma in Civil Engineering from a recognized institute. Bachelor's degree in civil engineering (B.E./B.Tech.) preferred. Minimum 1 year work experience in construction works. Proficiency in CAD software (e.g., AutoCAD, Civil 3D). Prior exposure to community-based or rural development projects is an added advantage.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Pauri Garhwal District Junior Engineer-Civil Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://pauri.nic.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 04-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.text: Diploma in Civil Engineering from a recognized institute. Bachelor's degree in civil engineering (B.E./B.Tech.) preferred. Minimum 1 year work experience in construction works. Proficiency in CAD software (e.g., AutoCAD, Civil 3D). Prior exposure to community-based or rural development projects is an added advantage.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Pauri Garhwal District Junior Engineer-Civil Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://pauri.nic.in/. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 04-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Pauri Garhwal District Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Pauri Garhwal District Junior Engineer-Civil recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Junior Engineer-Civil post is 04th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Engineer-Civil post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Diploma in Civil Engineering from a recognized institute. A Bachelor's degree in civil engineering (B.E./B.Tech.) is preferred, along with a minimum of 1 year of work experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Junior Engineer-Civil position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Junior Engineer-Civil post will receive a fixed salary of Rs. 35,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Engineer-Civil post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Engineer-Civil post in the Pauri Garhwal District recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their filled application forms to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Junior Engineer-Civil post?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Engineer-Civil role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Engineer-Civil post will involve Application Screening and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. What additional skills are preferred for the Junior Engineer-Civil role?
faq.answer: Proficiency in CAD software like AutoCAD and Civil 3D is required. Prior exposure to community-based or rural development projects is considered an added advantage.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Pauri Garhwal District, which is https://pauri.nic.in/. Links are also provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Pauri Garhwal District Junior Engineer-Civil recruitment is 74 / 02(1).2.1 / 2026-27.
